requirement_topic.en: Radio Equipment Conformity — AzStandard (AZS) National Standards for Radio Devices
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电设备合规——无线电设备AzStandard（AZS）国家标准
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電設備合規——無線電設備AzStandard（AZS）國家標準

summary.en: Radio and wireless equipment placed on the Azerbaijan market must comply with applicable AzStandard (AZS) national standards governing radio equipment parameters, frequency use, and technical characteristics. AzStandard (Azərbaycan Standartlaşdırma İnstitutu — Azerbaijan Standards Institute) is the national standards body responsible for developing and adopting standards in Azerbaijan. Many AZS standards in the radio equipment domain are adopted from ETSI EN standards (European Telecommunications Standards Institute) and from GOST/IEC/ISO series inherited through CIS technical cooperation. Applicable AZS standards cover radio frequency emission masks, out-of-band emission limits, receiver immunity, and declared radio parameters that must be confirmed during ICTA type approval testing. While the ICTA type approval process is the regulatory gate, conformity with the underlying AZS radio standards is the technical requirement that must be demonstrated. Azerbaijan increasingly aligns its radio standards with ETSI EN series as part of its trajectory toward ISO/IEC/ETSI adoption.
summary.zh: 投放阿塞拜疆市场的无线电及无线设备须符合适用的AzStandard（AZS）国家标准，该标准规定了无线电设备参数、频率使用及技术特性。AzStandard（Azərbaycan Standartlaşdırma İnstitutu——阿塞拜疆标准化研究院）是负责制定和采用阿塞拜疆标准的国家标准机构。无线电设备领域的许多AZS标准来源于ETSI EN标准（欧洲电信标准协会）及通过独联体技术合作继承的GOST/IEC/ISO系列。适用的AZS标准涵盖射频辐射掩模、带外辐射限值、接收机抗扰性及须在ICTA型号核准测试中得到确认的已声明无线电参数。ICTA型号核准程序是监管门槛，而符合相应AZS无线电标准的技术要求须通过此测试加以证明。阿塞拜疆正日益将其无线电标准与ETSI EN系列接轨，作为其采纳ISO/IEC/ETSI标准进程的一部分。
summary.zht: 投放亞塞拜然市場的無線電及無線設備須符合適用的AzStandard（AZS）國家標準，該標準規定了無線電設備參數、頻率使用及技術特性。AzStandard（Azərbaycan Standartlaşdırma İnstitutu——亞塞拜然標準化研究院）是負責制定和採用亞塞拜然標準的國家標準機構。無線電設備領域的許多AZS標準來源於ETSI EN標準（歐洲電信標準協會）及通過獨聯體技術合作繼承的GOST/IEC/ISO系列。適用的AZS標準涵蓋射頻輻射掩模、帶外輻射限值、接收機抗擾性及須在ICTA型號核准測試中得到確認的已聲明無線電參數。ICTA型號核准程序是監管門檻，而符合相應AZS無線電標準的技術要求須通過此測試加以證明。亞塞拜然正日益將其無線電標準與ETSI EN系列接軌，作為其採納ISO/IEC/ETSI標準進程的一部分。

standards_or_laws: AZS national standards for radio equipment — Azerbaijan Standards Institute (AzStandard), many adopted from ETSI EN series (e.g., ETSI EN 300 328 for 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, ETSI EN 301 893 for 5 GHz Wi-Fi) and GOST/IEC series
Law on Telecommunications of the Republic of Azerbaijan (2005, as amended) — establishes technical conformity requirements for radio equipment as a condition of ICTA type approval
ICTA (Information and Communications Technologies Agency of Azerbaijan) — enforces conformity with AZS radio standards through the type approval process

summary.en: Chinese radio equipment standards are issued by MIIT and SRRC and include GB 15629.11 (Wi-Fi / IEEE 802.11 standard, aligned with but distinct from ETSI EN 300 328 for 2.4 GHz) and YD/T series standards for cellular and IoT radio parameters. SRRC type approval validates conformity with Chinese radio standards before sale. Chinese GB-series radio standards and SRRC test reports are not recognised by AzStandard or ICTA and do not satisfy AZS radio equipment conformity requirements. While some test data produced to IEC or ETSI methods may be referenced in an ICTA application, full re-evaluation against AZS-applicable standards by a recognised laboratory is typically required.
summary.zh: 中国无线电设备标准由工业和信息化部和SRRC发布，包括GB 15629.11（Wi-Fi / IEEE 802.11标准，与2.4GHz ETSI EN 300 328接轨但有所差异）及蜂窝和物联网无线电参数YD/T系列标准。SRRC型号核准在销售前验证对中国无线电标准的符合性。中国GB系列无线电标准和SRRC测试报告不被AzStandard或ICTA承认，不满足AZS无线电设备合规要求。尽管依据IEC或ETSI方法产生的部分测试数据可在ICTA申请中被参考，但通常仍须由认可实验室依据适用AZS标准重新进行全面评估。
summary.zht: 中國無線電設備標準由工業和信息化部和SRRC發布，包括GB 15629.11（Wi-Fi / IEEE 802.11標準，與2.4GHz ETSI EN 300 328接軌但有所差異）及蜂窩和物聯網無線電參數YD/T系列標準。SRRC型號核准在銷售前驗證對中國無線電標準的符合性。中國GB系列無線電標準和SRRC測試報告不被AzStandard或ICTA承認，不滿足AZS無線電設備合規要求。儘管依據IEC或ETSI方法產生的部分測試數據可在ICTA申請中被參考，但通常仍須由認可實驗室依據適用AZS標準重新進行全面評估。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), validates conformity with Chinese radio standards before sale in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology — LAN/MAN (Wi-Fi / WLAN standard, China, aligned with IEEE 802.11)
YD/T series — MIIT industry standards for cellular, IoT, and wireless device radio parameters in China

gap.en: Chinese GB-series radio standards and SRRC test reports do not satisfy AZS radio equipment conformity requirements. Azerbaijan's AZS standards in this domain are increasingly aligned with ETSI EN series rather than Chinese GB standards, creating a technical divergence between what Chinese SRRC testing covers and what ICTA type approval requires. Exporters should confirm the specific AZS standards applicable to their radio product category with ICTA or a local technical consultant before commissioning tests. New test reports to AZS-applicable standards from a recognised laboratory are required; prior Chinese SRRC reports cannot simply be resubmitted.
gap.zh: 中国GB系列无线电标准和SRRC测试报告不满足AZS无线电设备合规要求。阿塞拜疆在此领域的AZS标准日益与ETSI EN系列接轨，而非中国GB标准，导致中国SRRC测试所涵盖内容与ICTA型号核准要求之间存在技术差异。出口商在委托测试前，应与ICTA或当地技术顾问确认适用于其无线电产品类别的具体AZS标准。须由认可实验室出具符合适用AZS标准的新测试报告；不能直接提交先前的中国SRRC报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB系列無線電標準和SRRC測試報告不滿足AZS無線電設備合規要求。亞塞拜然在此領域的AZS標準日益與ETSI EN系列接軌，而非中國GB標準，導致中國SRRC測試所涵蓋內容與ICTA型號核准要求之間存在技術差異。出口商在委託測試前，應與ICTA或當地技術顧問確認適用於其無線電產品類別的具體AZS標準。須由認可實驗室出具符合適用AZS標準的新測試報告；不能直接提交先前的中國SRRC報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — conformity with applicable AZS radio equipment standards required as part of ICTA type approval for radio devices sold in Azerbaijan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval validates conformity with Chinese GB/YD/T radio standards before sale in China

source.publisher: AzStandard — Azerbaijan Standards Institute (Azərbaycan Standartlaşdırma İnstitutu)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Conformity with AzStandard (AZS) radio equipment standards is required as the technical basis for ICTA type approval in Azerbaijan. AZS standards in this domain increasingly adopt ETSI EN methods rather than Chinese GB standards. Chinese SRRC test reports do not satisfy this requirement. New testing against applicable AZS standards by a recognised laboratory is required prior to ICTA type approval submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合AzStandard（AZS）无线电设备标准是阿塞拜疆ICTA型号核准技术基础的必要条件。此领域的AZS标准日益采用ETSI EN方法而非中国GB标准。中国SRRC测试报告不满足此要求。须在提交ICTA型号核准申请前，由认可实验室按适用AZS标准完成新的测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合AzStandard（AZS）無線電設備標準是亞塞拜然ICTA型號核准技術基礎的必要條件。此領域的AZS標準日益採用ETSI EN方法而非中國GB標準。中國SRRC測試報告不滿足此要求。須在提交ICTA型號核准申請前，由認可實驗室按適用AZS標準完成新的測試。

requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — AzStandard (AZS) National Standards Adopted from IEC CISPR / GOST
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——来源于IEC CISPR / GOST的AzStandard（AZS）国家标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——來源於IEC CISPR / GOST的AzStandard（AZS）國家標準

summary.en: Electronic and electrical equipment placed on the Azerbaijan market must comply with applicable AzStandard (AZS) national standards for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC), covering both radiated and conducted emission limits and immunity levels. Azerbaijan's AZS EMC standards draw from two heritage streams: GOST standards (the EAEU/CIS technical legacy adopted from Soviet-era and post-Soviet standardization) aligned with IEC CISPR publications for emission limits and IEC 61000 series for immunity, and increasingly direct adoptions from IEC and ETSI. For wireless and IoT devices, EMC testing evaluates emissions outside the intended transmission bands and the device's resistance to electromagnetic interference from other equipment. EMC conformity evidence is required as part of the ICTA type approval application dossier. Azerbaijan's national EMC standards are separate from EAEU TR CU 020/2011 — Azerbaijan does not participate in the EAEU conformity assessment framework and EAEU EAC EMC certificates are not recognised as substitutes in Azerbaijan.
summary.zh: 投放阿塞拜疆市场的电子和电气设备须符合适用的AzStandard（AZS）电磁兼容（EMC）国家标准，涵盖辐射和传导发射限值及抗扰度级别。阿塞拜疆AZS电磁兼容标准源自两个传统体系：与CISPR IEC出版物（发射限值）和IEC 61000系列（抗扰度）接轨的GOST标准（来自苏联时代及后苏联时代标准化的EAEU/独联体技术遗产），以及日益增多的IEC和ETSI直接采用标准。对于无线及物联网设备，电磁兼容测试评估预期传输频段以外的发射情况及设备对其他设备电磁干扰的抵抗能力。电磁兼容合规证据须作为ICTA型号核准申请材料的一部分提交。阿塞拜疆国家电磁兼容标准与EAEU TR CU 020/2011相互独立——阿塞拜疆不参与EAEU合格评定框架，EAEU EAC电磁兼容证书在阿塞拜疆不被承认为替代证明。
summary.zht: 投放亞塞拜然市場的電子和電氣設備須符合適用的AzStandard（AZS）電磁相容（EMC）國家標準，涵蓋輻射和傳導發射限值及抗擾度級別。亞塞拜然AZS電磁相容標準源自兩個傳統體系：與CISPR IEC出版物（發射限值）和IEC 61000系列（抗擾度）接軌的GOST標準（來自蘇聯時代及後蘇聯時代標準化的EAEU/獨聯體技術遺產），以及日益增多的IEC和ETSI直接採用標準。對於無線及物聯網設備，電磁相容測試評估預期傳輸頻段以外的發射情況及設備對其他設備電磁干擾的抵抗能力。電磁相容合規證據須作為ICTA型號核准申請材料的一部分提交。亞塞拜然國家電磁相容標準與EAEU TR CU 020/2011相互獨立——亞塞拜然不參與EAEU合格評定框架，EAEU EAC電磁相容證書在亞塞拜然不被承認為替代證明。

standards_or_laws: AZS national EMC standards — Azerbaijan Standards Institute (AzStandard), adopted from GOST series (aligned with IEC CISPR 32 for emissions, IEC CISPR 35 for immunity, IEC 61000 series for conducted emissions and immunity) and increasingly from direct IEC/ETSI adoptions
GOST 32137-2013 and related GOST EMC series — aligned with IEC CISPR publications, historically applied in Azerbaijan through CIS technical cooperation and now adopted as AZS standards
ICTA (Information and Communications Technologies Agency of Azerbaijan) — requires EMC conformity evidence as part of the type approval dossier for radio and telecom terminal equipment

summary.en: China's mandatory EMC regime for electronic and electrical equipment is enforced through CCC certification using standards GB/T 9254 (Information Technology Equipment emission, aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2). For wireless devices, EMC aspects are also partly addressed in SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL testing. Chinese CCC EMC certification to GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 does not substitute for Azerbaijan AZS EMC conformity requirements. While both China's GB/T 9254 and Azerbaijan's AZS EMC standards draw from the same underlying IEC CISPR publications, the test reports must originate from laboratories recognised by Azerbaijan/ICTA, not from CNCA-designated Chinese laboratories.
summary.zh: 中国针对电气和电子设备的强制性电磁兼容制度通过CCC认证执行，采用标准GB/T 9254（信息技术设备辐射，与CISPR 22/32接轨）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射，与IEC 61000-3-2接轨）。对于无线设备，电磁兼容方面也部分涵盖于SRRC型号核准和工业和信息化部NAL测试中。依据GB/T 9254和GB 17625.1进行的中国CCC电磁兼容认证不可替代阿塞拜疆AZS电磁兼容合规要求。尽管中国GB/T 9254和阿塞拜疆AZS电磁兼容标准均源自相同的IEC CISPR出版物，但测试报告须来自阿塞拜疆/ICTA认可的实验室，而非CNCA指定的中国实验室。
summary.zht: 中國針對電氣和電子設備的強制性電磁相容制度通過CCC認證執行，採用標準GB/T 9254（信息技術設備輻射，與CISPR 22/32接軌）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射，與IEC 61000-3-2接軌）。對於無線設備，電磁相容方面也部分涵蓋於SRRC型號核准和工業和信息化部NAL測試中。依據GB/T 9254和GB 17625.1進行的中國CCC電磁相容認證不可替代亞塞拜然AZS電磁相容合規要求。儘管中國GB/T 9254和亞塞拜然AZS電磁相容標準均源自相同的IEC CISPR出版物，但測試報告須來自亞塞拜然/ICTA認可的實驗室，而非CNCA指定的中國實驗室。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information Technology Equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (CCC mandatory, aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 17625.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (CCC mandatory, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, mandatory EMC certification for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

gap.en: Chinese CCC EMC certification (GB/T 9254, GB 17625.1) does not satisfy AZS EMC conformity requirements for the Azerbaijan market. While the underlying technical benchmarks may be broadly comparable (both reference IEC CISPR and IEC 61000 series), the test reports and conformity documentation must be issued by laboratories and conformity bodies recognised in Azerbaijan. Azerbaijan is not in the EAEU and does not accept EAEU EAC EMC certificates. Additionally, Azerbaijan does not participate in the IECEE CB Scheme mutual recognition arrangement in a way that automatically grants recognition to Chinese CB test reports — this must be verified with ICTA. New EMC testing to applicable AZS standards, with reports from ICTA-recognised laboratories, is required.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电磁兼容认证（GB/T 9254、GB 17625.1）不满足阿塞拜疆市场的AZS电磁兼容合规要求。尽管基础技术基准大体可比（均参考IEC CISPR和IEC 61000系列），但测试报告和合格文件须由阿塞拜疆认可的实验室和合格评定机构出具。阿塞拜疆不在EAEU内，不接受EAEU EAC电磁兼容证书。此外，阿塞拜疆参与IECEE CB Scheme相互承认安排的方式不会自动承认中国CB测试报告——须向ICTA核实。须由ICTA认可的实验室出具符合适用AZS标准的新电磁兼容测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電磁相容認證（GB/T 9254、GB 17625.1）不滿足亞塞拜然市場的AZS電磁相容合規要求。儘管基礎技術基準大體可比（均參考IEC CISPR和IEC 61000系列），但測試報告和合格文件須由亞塞拜然認可的實驗室和合格評定機構出具。亞塞拜然不在EAEU內，不接受EAEU EAC電磁相容證書。此外，亞塞拜然參與IECEE CB Scheme相互承認安排的方式不會自動承認中國CB測試報告——須向ICTA核實。須由ICTA認可的實驗室出具符合適用AZS標準的新電磁相容測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformity against applicable AZS national standards required as part of ICTA type approval dossier for electronic and wireless devices sold in Azerbaijan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC EMC certification to GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 required for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

source.publisher: AzStandard — Azerbaijan Standards Institute (Azərbaycan Standartlaşdırma İnstitutu)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity against applicable AZS national standards (drawn from IEC CISPR and IEC 61000 series via GOST and direct IEC adoption) is required as part of ICTA type approval in Azerbaijan. Chinese CCC EMC certification does not substitute. EAEU EAC EMC certificates are also not accepted — Azerbaijan is not in the EAEU. New EMC testing from ICTA-recognised laboratories against AZS standards is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿塞拜疆，符合适用AZS国家标准（通过GOST及直接采用IEC来源于IEC CISPR和IEC 61000系列）的电磁兼容合规是ICTA型号核准的必要条件。中国CCC电磁兼容认证不可替代。EAEU EAC电磁兼容证书亦不被接受——阿塞拜疆不在EAEU内。须由ICTA认可的实验室按AZS标准完成新的电磁兼容测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在亞塞拜然，符合適用AZS國家標準（通過GOST及直接採用IEC來源於IEC CISPR和IEC 61000系列）的電磁相容合規是ICTA型號核准的必要條件。中國CCC電磁相容認證不可替代。EAEU EAC電磁相容證書亦不被接受——亞塞拜然不在EAEU內。須由ICTA認可的實驗室按AZS標準完成新的電磁相容測試。
